No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. Plaintiff, the People of the State of California's motion for a preliminary injunction enjoining defendants Leonard Lacayo, Ada Lacayo and Lacayo & Associates from engaging in certain activities and requiring them to take certain actions is GRANTED in its entirety. Plaintiff has shown that they are likely to prevail on their claims that defendants committed numerous violations of the Immigration Consulting Act, the Unfair Competition Law and False Advertising Law and that the public interest is served by the granting of the requested preliminary injunction. Defendants have not shown that this motion is moot. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
